code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> NotStarted: Test available
    
    NotStarted --> InProgress: User clicks "Start Test"
    
    state InProgress {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> AnsweringQuestions
        AnsweringQuestions --> AnsweringQuestions: Select/Change answer
        AnsweringQuestions --> MarkedForReview: Mark for review
        MarkedForReview --> AnsweringQuestions: Continue answering
    }
    
    InProgress --> Submitted: User clicks submit
    InProgress --> AutoSubmitted: Timer expires
    
    Submitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    AutoSubmitted --> ResultsCalculated: System calculates score
    
    ResultsCalculated --> Analyzed: System analyzes performance
    
    state Analyzed {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> ScoreGenerated
        ScoreGenerated --> SectionBreakdownCreated
        SectionBreakdownCreated --> TopicBreakdownCreated
        TopicBreakdownCreated --> WeakAreasIdentified
        WeakAreasIdentified --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }
    
    Analyzed --> PracticeRecommended: Weak topics found
    Analyzed --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]: No weak topics
    
    PracticeRecommended --> NotStarted: Practice test scheduled
    
    note right of InProgress
        attempt.status: in_progress
        Timer running
        Answers being recorded
    end note
    
    note right of Submitted
        attempt.status: submitted
        submittedAt: timestamp
    end note
    
    note right of AutoSubmitted
        attempt.status: auto_submitted
        Forced submission by system
    end note
    
    note right of Analyzed
        score, correctAnswers calculated
        sectionBreakdown JSON created
        topicBreakdown JSON created
        weak_topics updated
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为IoT工业认证考试系统画一个完整的状态图。核心流程是：考生从ActuatorController获取测试，进入答题状态，最后系统分析结果。关键要体现PLC逻辑层和MQTT Broker在状态流转中的作用。
明白。我注意到您提到了两种提交方式——用户主动提交和系统自动提交。这两种路径在后续处理上有区别吗？比如Submitted和AutoSubmitted之后的状态是否一致？
没有区别，两种提交最终都汇聚到ResultsCalculated。但业务上需要区分记录，所以AutoSubmitted要标注为"强制提交"。另外，InProgress内部有个循环状态——考生可以标记题目待复查，这个用MarkedForReview节点。
好的，我先把主干画出来：ActuatorController触发NotStarted，点击开始后进入InProgress复合状态，内部包含AnsweringQuestions和MarkedForReview的循环。然后分叉到Submitted和AutoSubmitted。
接下来是分析阶段。ResultsCalculated之后进入Analyzed复合状态，这里MQTT Broker介入，依次生成ScoreGenerated、SectionBreakdownCreated、TopicBreakdownCreated，最后识别WeakAreasIdentified。注意这个链条要闭环回到PLC Logic。
Analyzed之后的分支我理解是这样：如果发现薄弱环节就进入PracticeRecommended，否则直接流向TelemetryStream。但PracticeRecommended之后是回到NotStarted吗？
对，PracticeRecommended之后安排新的练习测试，回到NotStarted。而直接到TelemetryStream表示考试流程正常结束。另外需要在InProgress、Submitted、AutoSubmitted、Analyzed四个状态旁加注释，说明attempt.status和关键字段。
已完成。四个注释已添加：InProgress标注timer运行和答案记录中；Submitted和AutoSubmitted分别标注时间戳和强制提交；Analyzed详细列出score、correctAnswers、sectionBreakdown JSON、topicBreakdown JSON、weak_topics的生成过程。
检查无误。整个流程覆盖了从ActuatorController获取测试、PLC Logic处理答题状态、MQTT Broker驱动结果分析，到最终TelemetryStream上报或PracticeRecommended循环的完整闭环。可以定稿了。
